title: Two-Phase Locking (2PL) Protocol Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the progression of a transaction through the Growing and Shrinking phases of the 2PL protocol, showing the rules for acquiring and releasing locks.
relationships: A transaction begins and enters the Growing Phase where it can only acquire locks. After acquiring all needed locks, it reaches the Lock Point. It then enters the Shrinking Phase where it can only release locks. After releasing all locks, the transaction ends.
